AppChecklistImage.description: Needed properties for a checklist image.

src.description: The url of the image for the title.

alt.description: The alt text for the image.

background-color.description: The color of the background in case the url does not work.

text-color.description: The color of the text on top of the image.

AppChecklistItem.description: Needed properties for a checklist item.

id.description: The unique identifier for an item.

link.description: The url for more information about the item (Like a wiki).

map.description: The url to the map ref.

more.description: A longer and more detailed explanation of the item.

icon.description: Icon to show in the item.

AppChecklistCategory.description: Needed properties for a game checklist.

id.description: The unique identifier for an achievement.

image.description: The url of the image for the achievement.

hidden.description: If the category should be hidden in the main checklist page.

items.description: The list of items for the achievement.

AppChecklistTab.description: A tab to show in the checklist page.

id.description: The unique identifier for a tab.

title.description: Name of the tab to show in the menu.

icon.description: The icon to show in the tab.

categories.description: List of the ids of the categories to show in the tab.

AppChecklist.description: A list of achievements for a game to complete.

id.description: The unique identifier for a checklist (No spaces).

display-name.description: The name of the game to show in the menu.

page-header.description: Header properties to show in the checklist page.

image.description: Image to show in the middle of the checklist at the top.

title.description: The title to show below the image and at the tab.

subtitle.description: The subtitle to show below the title.

categories.description: Categories to complete for the game.

map.description: The url to the map image to show in the tab "map".

tabs.description: Tabs to show in the checklist page.

font.description: The fonts to use in the checklist page.

title.description: The font to use for the title.

subtitle.description: The font to use for the subtitle.

category-title.description: The font to use for the category title.

category-description.description: The font to use for the category description.

item-title.description: The font to use for the item title.

item-description.description: The font to use for the item description.

text.description: The font to use for the text.

background-image.description: The image to show in the checklist page as background.

thumbnail-image.description: The image to show as a thumbnail in the menu and the home page.
